'''sasosho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zachun|zachun]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-s-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zachun|zachun]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| sasosho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæsesheth|sæsesheth]] || [[word:sæseshej|sæseshej]] || [[word:sæseshesh|sæseshesh]] || [[word:sæseshe|sæseshe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sasososhoth|sasososhoth]] || [[word:sasososhoj|sasososhoj]] || [[word:sasososhosh|sasososhosh]] || [[word:sasososho|sasososho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sasoshoth|sasoshoth]] || [[word:sasoshoj|sasoshoj]] || [[word:sasoshosh|sasoshosh]] || [[word:sasosho|sasosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sasofshofth|sasofshofth]] || [[word:sasofshofj|sasofshofj]] || [[word:sasofshofsh|sasofshofsh]] || [[word:sasofshof|sasofshof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sasoshotho|sasoshotho]] || [[word:sasoshojo|sasoshojo]] || [[word:sasoshosho|sasoshosho]] || [[word:sasoshoko|sasoshoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sasoshoth|sasoshoth]] || [[word:sasoshoj|sasoshoj]] || [[word:sasoshosh|sasoshosh]] || [[word:sasosho|sasosho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sasoshothol|sasoshothol]] || [[word:sasoshojol|sasoshojol]] || [[word:sasoshoshol|sasoshoshol]] || [[word:sasoshokol|sasoshokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sasoshoothotho|sasoshoothotho]] || [[word:sasoshoojojo|sasoshoojojo]] || [[word:sasoshooshosho|sasoshooshosho]] || [[word:sasoshooko|sasoshooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sasoshothon|sasoshothon]] || [[word:sasoshojon|sasoshojon]] || [[word:sasoshoshon|sasoshoshon]] || [[word:sasoshokon|sasoshokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sasoshothooro|sasoshothooro]] || [[word:sasoshojooro|sasoshojooro]] || [[word:sasoshoshooro|sasoshoshooro]] || [[word:sasoshokooro|sasoshokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|1e8b6ef}}
